headline: 3 Big Reasons to Love Vertiv (VRT)
summary: Vertiv has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 102%, reaching $254.23 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
